example_prompt: Handle bulk SMS opt-out notifications from Africa's Talking subscribers.

senderId.description: The shortcode or alphanumeric sender ID that the subscriber opted out from.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number of the subscriber who opted out.

gotchas: Africa's Talking automatically appends opt-out instructions to the first message you send to each subscriber. Subsequent messages are sent as-is without the instructions.
You must honor opt-outs. Store opted-out phone numbers and exclude them from future sends to avoid being flagged as a spammer.
